item.title: 250th: Beach Cleanups
item.description: 250th: Beach Cleanups is scheduled for June 27, 2026 at 9:00 AM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours Scheduled
item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for June 16, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.

item.description: Director's Hearing is scheduled for June 15, 2026 at 4:00 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.
